message:
feat(io): support headerless CSV input with auto-generated column names

Refactor read_csv_with_options to handle has_headers: false by treating
the first row as data instead of headers and generating column_0,
column_1, ... names automatically. The headers type changes from
csv::StringRecord to Vec<String> to unify both paths. Downstream
index_col extraction works with the generated names.

Add tests verifying auto-naming preserves all data rows and that
index_col works correctly with generated column names.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
